name: Houston's Canadian Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add the carrots, celery, and onions all at once and sauté until soft but not brown.
3. Stir in flour to combine with the vegetables. Cook until the mixture begins to turn a light-brown color.
4. Gradually add chicken broth over medium-high heat, stirring continuously with a whisk to prevent lumps.
5. Continue cooking until a thick base forms. Add half-and-half and stir gently not to boil.
6. Stir in Velveeta cheese until fully melted and smooth.
7. Just before serving, stir in the chopped parsley. Garnish with diced tomatoes or jalapenos if desired.
